task_completion.description: Verify the event type is set to Soft Trigger for the Entrance Camera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Event Rules dialog, the 'Event' section or column shows 'Soft Trigger' and the source/camera is set to 'Entrance Camera'.

task_completion.description: Verify the soft trigger button is named correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name', 'Button text', or 'Trigger Name' field in the Event section is filled with exactly 'Flag Suspect'.

task_completion.description: Verify the action is set to create a bookmark.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Action' section or column shows 'Bookmark' and the target camera for the action is set to 'Entrance Camera'.

task_completion.description: Verify the bookmark title is correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Bookmark Name', 'Title', or 'Text' field in the Action section is filled with exactly 'Suspicious Activity'.

task_completion.description: Verify the bookmark duration is set to 30 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Duration', 'Fixed Duration', or time settings in the Action section explicitly show a duration of 30 seconds (or 30s).

task_completion.description: Verify the rule has been saved and appears in the rules list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Event Rules list displays a saved row summarizing the rule: Event 'Soft Trigger' ('Flag Suspect') and Action 'Bookmark' ('Suspicious Activity').

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Nx Witness VMS interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Nx Witness Desktop Client or Web Admin interface, specifically the Event Rules dialog.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to configure the rule via API.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration steps are performed in the GUI, without relying on terminal windows executing curl commands or python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the settings are entered into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Flag Suspect' and 'Suspicious Activity' are typed into the correct input fields within the VMS dialogs, not just written in a text editor or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring an Event Rule in the Nx Witness VMS. The Event type must be 'Soft Trigger' (API: softwareTrigger) targeting the 'Entrance Camera' with the button name 'Flag Suspect'. The Action type must be 'Bookmark' (API: bookmarkLog) targeting the 'Entrance Camera' with the title 'Suspicious Activity' and a fixed duration of 30 seconds. Look for the Event Rules dialog in the Nx Witness Desktop Client or Web Admin.
